target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Upper floors show extensive structural collapse and debris; lower brick walls are largely intact but windows are blown out; damage covers more than 45% of visible target area consistent with severe damage definition for framed buildings.

summary: One building assessed with SEVERE damage confirmed, showing extensive upper floor collapse and debris. The overall scene depicts a long, multi-unit brick building with significant structural damage across its upper levels, while the lower walls remain standing but are heavily compromised with blown-out windows and scattered debris. The functional impact is likely total loss of occupancy and use due to the severe structural damage.
